text: In the first scene, I feel a subtle tension mixed with anticipation, as conversations hum around me in a space both open and marked by purpose. I am aware of a communal energy, yet conscious of my own individuality within the gathering. In the second scene, standing before a display dedicated to research and design, I am drawn into contemplation. The environment feels inviting and intellectually charged, making me reflect on the productive uncertainty and optimism found in creative experimentation. Here, possibility feels tangible, and I sense a gentle encouragement to imagine and to innovate.
